meta.title: Great Movie & TV Title Logos
meta.description: Curated library of the most design-rich movie & TV title logos — the fancy, custom-lettered, ornamented, emblem-driven ones worth recreating. Each entry is a recreation brief: the signature design element, a full design breakdown, defining traits, a Google-Font starting point to build from, a regeneration prompt, and a link to view the real logo.
meta.note: These are chosen for DISTINCTIVE LOGO DESIGN, not font. 'fontStartingPoint' is a real Google Font to use as a base you then customize (add the ornament, effect, emblem, or finish described). 'referenceUrl' opens an image search for the real title treatment.
meta.logoSource: Logo images via TMDB (themoviedb.org). This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
meta.logoFiles: Local copies in logos/ (relative to the gallery); logoUrl is the TMDB CDN fallback.

logos.title: Willow
logos.designBreakdown: An elegant golden serif with elongated strokes and sharp, spiky pointed serifs. The letters carry a warm gold gradient wrapped in a soft, mystical glow and light sparkle. Delicate yet enchanted, evoking classic 1980s sword-and-sorcery fantasy. Luminous and ornate.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant golden serif with sharp pointed serifs and elongated strokes, warm gold gradient, soft mystical glow and sparkle, fantasy

logos.title: Sleepy Hollow
logos.signatureElement: Ghostly, wide-tracked classical serif capitals veiled in fog
logos.designBreakdown: Elegant, wide-spaced Roman serif capitals in cold silver-white, with refined, slightly sharpened terminals, dissolving into churchyard mist. Restrained gothic gloom rather than gore, the eeriness lives in the negative space and the bare-tree-and-crescent-moon atmosphere framing the type.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant wide-tracked Roman serif capitals in cold silver-white, sharpened terminals dissolving into churchyard fog, gothic and restrained

logos.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, aristocratic serif capitals with very fine strokes and long, tapered serifs, set in a wide, symmetrical line. The metal is a warm gold-bronze with a soft polished sheen and faint bevel. Elegant ligatures link the letters, and the subtitle sits below in smaller, widely spaced caps. The overall feel is refined, ancient and epic.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant tall thin-serif capitals in warm gold, elongated tapered serifs, wide symmetric spacing, subtle metallic sheen, epic medieval fantasy title

logos.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
logos.designBreakdown: Stately flared-serif capitals with humanist proportions and crisp, pointed serifs, set in an even, symmetrical line. The finish suggests aged carved stone with a cool, faintly icy silver sheen. Refined and mythic, with a whisper of frost. Grand and storybook.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant flared-serif capitals carved from aged stone, icy silver sheen, crisp pointed serifs, stately mythic fantasy title

logos.title: Pan's Labyrinth
logos.signatureElement: Storybook capitals entwined with organic root-and-vine flourishes
logos.designBreakdown: Ornate fairy-tale serif capitals reading PAN'S LABYRINTH, aged like old parchment and entwined with curling faun-horn, root and vine flourishes that spiral like the labyrinth itself. Warm sepia-gold on dark, high-contrast with delicate hairline serifs, enchanting yet faintly sinister.
logos.promptSnippet: Ornate aged fairy-tale serif capitals entwined with curling root, horn and vine flourishes spiraling like a labyrinth, sepia-gold on dark, faintly sinister

logos.title: American Gods
logos.signatureElement: Monumental antique serif, mythic and weathered
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, narrow all-caps serif capitals with sharp, flaring bracketed serifs, monumental like carving on an ancient temple. Rendered in bone-white or tarnished bronze, the letters carry a faint aged patina bridging Old-World antiquity and Americana. Austere and imposing, the wordmark feels chiseled from myth.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall narrow monumental serif capitals with flaring serifs, bone-white or tarnished bronze, faint aged patina, chiseled temple-carving, austere mythic wordmark

logos.title: The Haunting of Hill House
logos.designBreakdown: An elegant, high-contrast old-style serif set in refined mixed case, thin hairlines meeting graceful bracketed serifs. Rendered in ghost-white or pale gray against deep shadow, the type is quiet, aristocratic and Victorian, like an engraved nameplate on a haunted manor. Restraint and delicacy make it feel genteel yet cold.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant high-contrast old-style serif, delicate hairlines and bracketed serifs, ghost-white on deep shadow, refined Victorian engraved nameplate, quiet and cold

logos.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
logos.designBreakdown: Slender, high-contrast capitals with delicate pointed serifs and elongated proportions inspired by Tolkien's own lettering, finished in warm burnished gold. Fine hairlines and graceful tapering strokes evoke elven craftsmanship, with the small title set above the larger one. A faint metallic gleam and symmetrical centered stacking suggest an inscription upon a ring of power.
logos.promptSnippet: Slender elongated gold capitals, delicate pointed serifs, high-contrast hairlines, elven elegance, centered stacked composition, burnished metallic sheen, Tolkien-inspired inscription

logos.title: Beetlejuice
logos.signatureElement: Worn antique Caslon-style serif with a custom hooked 'J'
logos.designBreakdown: A high-contrast, old-fashioned Caslon Antique serif, irregular, roughly inked and worn, with the J of BEETLEJUICE custom-hooked into a playful swash. It ties to the film's black-and-white-stripe-and-acid-green palette. Vintage horror-comedy: elegant letterpress gone slightly askew and grubby.
logos.promptSnippet: Worn high-contrast antique Caslon serif spelling BEETLEJUICE with a custom hooked J, roughly inked and vintage, black-and-white stripe and acid-green accents

logos.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
logos.signatureElement: Ornate blood-red Victorian serif with elongated, interlocking letterforms
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, opulent Victorian-gothic serif capitals spelling DRACULA in deep blood-red, with elongated ascenders and art-nouveau interlocking flourishes echoing Eiko Ishioka's crimson-and-gold world. Often crowned by a carved stone-gargoyle crest. Rich, aristocratic and decadent, gold-leaf highlights on velvet black.
logos.promptSnippet: Opulent blood-red Victorian-gothic serif capitals, elongated interlocking letterforms with art-nouveau flourishes and gold accents, crowned by a carved gargoyle crest

logos.title: The Lion King
logos.signatureElement: Hand-carved, cracked golden capitals with African-tribal chisel marks
logos.designBreakdown: Rough-hewn capitals that look chiseled from stone or wood, uneven and organic with an African-inspired taper and cracks, glowing warm gold. In the film title they sit against a Pride Rock sunrise, Simba's silhouette below a burning-orange sun disc. Earthy, majestic and sun-baked.
logos.promptSnippet: Rough hand-carved golden capitals with African-tribal taper and cracks, set against a burning-orange sunrise disc and Pride Rock silhouette, earthy and majestic

logos.title: Moulin Rouge!
logos.signatureElement: Bright sparkle glint on cabaret-red lettering
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, theatrical lettering in vivid cabaret red, catching a bright diamond sparkle glint. Gold accents and glitter give it burlesque opulence, paired with the windmill motif. The look is Belle-Epoque marquee, decadent and bohemian. Glittering and seductive.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold theatrical red lettering with bright sparkle glint, cabaret glamour, gold accents, windmill motif, glittering Belle-Epoque marquee

logos.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
logos.designBreakdown: Weathered, hand-chiseled serif capitals with an old-world, seafaring character and a slightly uneven baseline. Rendered in tarnished silver-pewter with distress, pitting and salt-worn wear. A skull-and-crossbones emblem anchors the treatment. Adventurous, ominous and swashbuckling.
logos.promptSnippet: Weathered tarnished-silver engraved serif capitals, old-world nautical feel, skull-and-crossbones emblem, distressed pitted metal, swashbuckling adventure

logos.title: Coraline
logos.signatureElement: Spidery hand-drawn gothic letters accented with sewn-button eyes
logos.designBreakdown: Irregular, hand-drawn gothic-whimsy capitals with a Da Vinci-manuscript feel, spindly, slightly wobbling strokes in cold indigo-blue. Letter counters and dots become little sewn buttons with X-stitched thread, echoing the film's button-eye motif. Storybook-eerie: elegant but subtly wrong.
logos.promptSnippet: Spidery hand-drawn gothic capitals in cold indigo, spindly wobbling strokes, counters accented with X-stitched sewn buttons, storybook-eerie button-eye motif

logos.title: Wonka
logos.signatureElement: Top hat hidden in the flourished W
logos.designBreakdown: Elaborate, Victorian-flavored flourished lettering, hand-crafted to echo copperplate handwriting with lush swashes and ornaments. The capital W hides a top hat within its curling flourish, a clever visual pun. Warm gold sits against a rich purple, playful and confectionery. Whimsical and ornate.
logos.promptSnippet: Elaborate Victorian flourished display lettering, warm gold on purple, ornate swashes, a top hat hidden inside the W, whimsical

logos.title: Wicked
logos.signatureElement: Emerald-green lettering with hidden two-witch silhouette
logos.designBreakdown: Bold custom lettering with sharp, angular terminals and pointed apexes, faintly gothic and mystical. Deep emerald green with a metallic sheen and darker shadowing gives it depth. The mark's identity leans on the classic silhouette of Elphaba whispering to Glinda hidden within the composition. Theatrical and bewitching.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold emerald-green custom lettering, spiked angular terminals, metallic sheen, mystical gothic, hidden two-witch silhouette, theatrical

logos.title: Cheers
logos.designBreakdown: Warm, hand-lettered display serif spelling Cheers in the style of a gilded 1890s Boston tavern sign, generous, friendly weight with soft bracketed serifs and a nostalgic sepia-and-gold glow. Often paired with a decorative banner or vintage illustration. Cozy, sentimental Americana.
logos.promptSnippet: Warm hand-lettered display serif reading Cheers, gilded 1890s tavern-sign style, soft bracketed serifs, sepia-and-gold glow, cozy nostalgic Americana

logos.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
logos.signatureElement: Faux-calligraphic brush strokes with Air Nomad symbol
logos.designBreakdown: Latin letters styled as East-Asian ink-brush calligraphy, with tapering strokes, dry-brush edges and energetic sweeps. AVATAR sits large alongside the swirling Air Nomad emblem and a red seal/chop accent. Elemental, mythic, scroll-painting aesthetic.
logos.promptSnippet: Latin capitals styled as East-Asian ink-brush calligraphy with dry-brush edges, air-swirl emblem and red seal accent, epic animated title logo

logos.title: Downton Abbey
logos.designBreakdown: Classical Roman inscriptional capitals, generously letter-spaced and thin, in warm gold or cream, evoking the engraved brass nameplates of an Edwardian country estate. The restraint is deliberate, elegant proportion over ornament, often stacked over a thin rule. Understated aristocratic heritage.
logos.promptSnippet: Classical Roman inscriptional capitals, wide letter-spacing, warm gold engraved-brass finish, thin elegant strokes, restrained Edwardian estate elegance

logos.title: Gravity Falls
logos.designBreakdown: Rustic capitals built from rough-hewn tree logs and branches, complete with sawn ends, knots and bark texture, as if nailed together from the forest. Warm woodsy browns with a mysterious dusk shadow. Carries a hidden-cryptogram, cabin-in-the-woods mystery vibe.
logos.promptSnippet: Rustic capitals built from rough tree logs and branches with sawn ends and bark texture, woodsy browns, eerie forest-mystery cartoon title logo

logos.title: Penny Dreadful
logos.signatureElement: Victorian penny-pamphlet ornate serif on aged paper
logos.designBreakdown: Ornate Victorian display capitals styled after a 19th-century penny-pamphlet cover, with high-contrast strokes, flaring bracketed serifs and antiquarian character. Printed in faded blood-red or sooty black on mottled, foxed paper, the letters carry woodcut roughness and worn ink. The effect is a lurid pulp broadside pulled from a gaslit London bookstall.
logos.promptSnippet: Ornate Victorian pamphlet serif capitals, faded blood-red ink on mottled aged paper, woodcut roughness, high-contrast flaring serifs, gaslit penny-dreadful broadside

logos.title: Better Call Saul
logos.signatureElement: Garish scales-of-justice with mismatched ad scripts
logos.designBreakdown: Deliberately tacky legal-billboard styling: BETTER CALL in a hurried sign-painter's script and Saul in a drugstore greeting-card cursive, mismatched on purpose. A brushy clip-art scales-of-justice sits alongside in patriotic red, white and blue. Cheap, loud and perfectly on-brand for a two-bit lawyer.
logos.promptSnippet: Tacky legal-billboard logo, mismatched sign-painter and greeting-card scripts with a clip-art scales-of-justice, red white and blue, cheap ad aesthetic

logos.title: The Crown
logos.designBreakdown: Refined, letter-spaced serif capitals with delicate high-contrast strokes and crisp fine serifs, finished in restrained warm gold on black. The treatment is minimal yet aristocratic, no ornament beyond immaculate proportion, evoking engraved royal stationery and monarchic gravitas.
logos.promptSnippet: Refined letter-spaced serif capitals, delicate high-contrast hairlines, warm gold on black, minimal aristocratic elegance, engraved royal-stationery gravitas

logos.title: Demon Slayer
logos.signatureElement: Green-and-black checkered pattern in the strokes
logos.designBreakdown: Sharp, fierce brush-styled letters with aggressive angular cuts, filled with the green-and-black checkered (ichimatsu) pattern from Tanjiro's haori. A hot crimson glow and water-wave brush flourishes edge the strokes. Bold, elemental and blade-sharp.
logos.promptSnippet: Fierce sharp brush lettering filled with a green-and-black checkered pattern, crimson glow and water-wave flourishes, intense anime title logo

logos.title: Bridgerton
logos.designBreakdown: Elegant high-contrast Didone capitals with fine hairlines, dressed in curling floral filigree and vine flourishes drawn from Regency wallpaper and embroidery. The Bridgerton bee often perches within the composition as the secret motif. Ivory, powder-blue and gilt tones give a refined, romantic ballroom opulence.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant high-contrast Didone capitals wrapped in Regency floral filigree and vines, hidden bee motif, ivory-and-gilt palette, romantic ballroom opulence

logos.title: The Gilded Age
logos.designBreakdown: Elegant high-contrast Caslon-style titling capitals with crisp bracketed serifs, generously letter-spaced and rendered in luminous gold leaf. The gilding carries a soft engraved sheen evoking 1880s embossed invitations and monogrammed silver. Aristocratic, symmetrical and opulently restrained.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant high-contrast Caslon titling capitals in luminous gold leaf, crisp bracketed serifs, wide spacing, engraved 1880s invitation sheen, aristocratic opulence

logos.title: Metropolis
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, geometric Art Deco capitals with a machine-age, Futurist rigidity. Rendered in gold-bronze with streamlined, precisely ruled strokes. Monumental and architectural, echoing the film's towering skyline. Iconic 1920s German expressionist poster design.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold geometric Art Deco capitals, machine-age Futurist styling, gold-bronze, streamlined strokes, monumental 1920s German expressionist poster

logos.title: Casablanca
logos.designBreakdown: Classic 1940s Hollywood serif capitals with warm cream-gold coloring and subtle, exotic tapering to the serifs. Elegant and understated, carrying old-world romance. Traditionally set over a stylized map of Africa and Morocco. Timeless and cinematic.
logos.promptSnippet: Classic 1940s Hollywood serif capitals, warm cream-gold, subtle exotic tapered serifs, elegant and romantic, set over a Moroccan map

logos.title: Gladiator
logos.designBreakdown: Austere Roman inscriptional capitals, wide and all-caps, in the Trajan tradition. They appear carved into weathered stone with pitted, eroded surfaces and chipped edges. The color is a cold silver-gray with a faint embossed shadow that reads as depth. Monumental, severe and ancient.
logos.promptSnippet: Weathered Roman inscriptional stone-carved capitals, eroded pitted texture, silver-gray, wide tracking, embossed shadow, monumental epic

logos.title: The Great Gatsby
logos.designBreakdown: Opulent gold Art Deco capitals framed by a symmetrical sunburst of chevrons and radiating rays. Everything gleams with 1920s Jazz-Age glamour and geometric precision. The fan/sunburst emblem crowns the wordmark like a theater marquee. Lavish, glittering and grand.
logos.promptSnippet: Gold Art Deco capitals within a symmetric sunburst-and-chevron frame, glamorous 1920s Jazz-Age glitz, geometric rays, opulent

logos.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
logos.designBreakdown: Delicate, tall, condensed lettering with an early-twentieth-century Central European hotel-signage feel. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered, in soft pastel pinks and creams with fine hairlines. Refined, precise and storybook, like an embossed luggage label. Mitteleuropa elegance.
logos.promptSnippet: Delicate tall condensed period lettering, pastel pink and cream, perfectly symmetrical centered layout, early-1900s European hotel elegance, storybook

logos.title: The Witch
logos.signatureElement: Twin-V 'VV' ligature standing in for the W
logos.designBreakdown: Austere colonial-era serif capitals reading THE VVITCH, with two overlapping V's replacing the W exactly as a 1630s printer would set it. High-contrast old-style letterforms, tightly tracked, in bone-white or tarnished gold on deep black. Restrained and engraved, period authenticity over ornament.
logos.promptSnippet: Austere 17th-century serif capitals reading THE VVITCH with twin overlapping V's for the W, high-contrast, bone-white on black, engraved and restrained

logos.title: La La Land
logos.signatureElement: Retro Art-Deco wordmark in twilight gradient
logos.designBreakdown: Elegant Art Deco capitals with 1950s musical-poster and Blue Note styling, clean and geometric. They are often washed in a purple-to-blue twilight gradient recalling a Los Angeles dusk. Romantic, nostalgic and mid-century. Dreamy and cinematic.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant Art Deco capitals, 1950s jazz-poster styling, purple-to-blue twilight gradient, clean geometric letterforms, romantic mid-century Hollywood

logos.title: Miami Vice
logos.designBreakdown: Wide, squarish Eurostile-style capitals in cool white or pastel, set against a hot flamingo-pink and Miami-blue palette drawn from the city's Art Deco district. Sleek, minimal and unmistakably 1980s, often accented with a palm-tree silhouette. Neon-lit, breezy and glamorous.
logos.promptSnippet: Wide squarish Eurostile capitals, cool pastel type on flamingo-pink and Miami-blue, palm-tree accent, sleek minimal 1980s neon Art Deco glamour

logos.title: Boardwalk Empire
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, geometric Art Deco capitals with strong verticals and period stylization, evoking Prohibition-era Atlantic City signage and boardwalk marquees. Warm sepia and aged-gold tones with a faint vintage grain suggest 1920s printed posters. Stately, symmetrical and jazz-age glamorous.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold geometric Art Deco capitals, 1920s boardwalk marquee styling, warm sepia and aged-gold tones, symmetrical jazz-age glamour, vintage print grain

logos.title: The Queen's Gambit
logos.designBreakdown: Elegant mid-century high-contrast serif capitals with sharp thin-and-thick modulation and fine serifs, tuned to a chic 1960s editorial mood. Often warm cream or gold on a muted teal-green, with generous spacing and quiet sophistication. Refined, intellectual and period-perfect.
logos.promptSnippet: Elegant high-contrast serif capitals, sharp thin-thick modulation, 1960s editorial mood, cream-gold on muted teal, refined intellectual period sophistication

logos.title: Only Murders in the Building
logos.designBreakdown: Refined Art Deco capitals inspired by the Arconia's 1920s New York apartment signage, geometric, elegantly thin, with subtle stepped detailing, rendered in warm gilt gold. Symmetrical and architectural, framed as if etched on a lobby directory or elevator plate. Dark, plush and mysterious.
logos.promptSnippet: Refined thin Art Deco capitals, gilt gold, subtle stepped detailing, symmetrical architectural framing, 1920s New York lobby-plate mood on plush dark ground

logos.title: Spirited Away
logos.signatureElement: Bold sumi-e brush-calligraphy title with a vermilion seal accent
logos.designBreakdown: Hand-brushed sumi-ink strokes with living, tapering pressure, thick-to-thin, dry-brush edges, for the Ghibli logotype, balanced by a red vermilion accent or seal. Confident, organic, breathing calligraphy rather than a set font; imperfect and alive. Black brushwork with a single warm red note.
logos.promptSnippet: Hand-brushed sumi-ink calligraphy with living thick-to-thin pressure and dry-brush edges, a single vermilion seal accent, organic and breathing, black on cream

logos.title: Drive
logos.designBreakdown: The title is set in a slanted, casual brush script in vivid neon hot-pink, all connected, spontaneous strokes. It glows against black with an unmistakable 1980s synthwave cool. Handwritten, retro and stylish. Electric and moody.
logos.promptSnippet: Slanted casual brush script in vivid neon pink, connected handwritten strokes, 1980s synthwave glow against black, retro cool

logos.title: Barbie
logos.designBreakdown: The famous bouncy, hot-pink custom script, all rounded brush strokes and a playful, uneven baseline. Letters are glossy and buoyant with confident, girlish energy. Instantly recognizable and effervescent. Sweet, bold and iconic.
logos.promptSnippet: Bouncy hot-pink custom script, rounded brush strokes, playful uneven baseline, glossy finish, iconic girlish wordmark

logos.title: I Love Lucy
logos.signatureElement: White script stitched on a satin heart
logos.designBreakdown: Flowing white connected cursive reading I Love Lucy, laid across a plush red satin heart as if embroidered in thread. Soft fabric folds and a warm sheen give it a hand-stitched, romantic 1950s warmth. Cozy, iconic and sentimental.
logos.promptSnippet: Flowing white cursive stitched across a plush red satin heart, embroidered thread look, warm 1950s sitcom title logo

logos.title: Happy Days
logos.designBreakdown: Fat, friendly retro brush-script with heavy spurred strokes and a rockabilly bounce, evoking a 50s diner sign or jukebox chrome. Often paired with a warm red-and-cream palette and a subtle drop shadow. Nostalgic, upbeat Americana.
logos.promptSnippet: Chunky retro brush-script with heavy spurred strokes and a jukebox bounce, red-and-cream 1950s diner nostalgia title logo

logos.title: The Golden Girls
logos.designBreakdown: Warm gold cursive with a lively bounce, thick-to-thin brush strokes and buoyant looping ascenders. A soft metallic-gold gradient and gentle glow sit against black for an elegant, feel-good glimmer. Friendly, breezy and sunny.
logos.promptSnippet: Warm bouncing gold brush-script with metallic gradient and soft glow on black, cheerful 1980s sitcom title logo

logos.title: Dexter
logos.designBreakdown: Blood-red retro brush-script capitals with spurred, curling terminals, drawn from a casual 1950s-style script. The capital T is quietly reshaped into a knife blade, a subtle nod to the blood-spatter analyst. Elegant and playful on the surface, menacing underneath.
logos.promptSnippet: Blood-red retro brush-script capitals with the T subtly shaped like a knife blade, elegant yet sinister crime-drama title logo

logos.title: Star Wars
logos.signatureElement: Heavy geometric caps receding into a starfield
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, heavyweight geometric sans capitals with flat terminals, uniform monolithic strokes, and a distinctive extra-wide W. In the films the flat golden-yellow wordmark shrinks in one-point perspective, tumbling back into a black star-filled void. A thin outline defines the gold face; no serifs, no ornament, just bold futurist confidence.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold golden geometric sans-serif title receding in one-point perspective into a black starfield, thin outline, flat monolithic capitals, cinematic sci-fi logo

logos.title: Blade Runner
logos.signatureElement: Rounded-corner futurist caps with a hazy warm-red glow
logos.designBreakdown: Wide, uniform-stroke uppercase sans with softly rounded corners and squared counters, evoking retro-future signage. Rendered in a warm reddish-orange hue that smoulders through perpetual smog and neon. Letterspacing is generous and the letters feel machined and calm rather than aggressive, monolithic and quietly high-tech.
logos.promptSnippet: Wide futurist uppercase sans with soft rounded corners glowing warm reddish-orange through neon smog, machined monolithic retro-tech title logo

logos.title: Tron
logos.signatureElement: Electric-blue circuitry glowing along beveled letter edges
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy blocky capitals extruded into 3D, their faces dark and their beveled edges tracing bright electric-blue and cyan glow. Fine circuit-board lines and grid patterns run across the letterforms like a printed board. The whole mark reads as illuminated computer hardware, neon light bleeding off chiseled geometric slabs against black.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy blocky 3D capitals with beveled edges glowing electric blue, circuit-board line inlays and grid texture on black, neon computer-tech logo

logos.title: Ghost in the Shell
logos.signatureElement: Wireframe techno caps amid green digital code
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, slightly condensed techno capitals with a cool machined feel, tied in the titles to green wireframe and 8-bit type animation and scrolling code. The English wordmark stacks GHOST IN THE SHELL in clean, squared sans letters, often shadowed by the Japanese subtitle. Clinical, digital, and precise, human type dissolving into data.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall condensed techno capitals in a stacked sci-fi title, cool machined squared sans amid green wireframe code and digital rain, clinical cyber logo

logos.title: Tron: Legacy
logos.signatureElement: Sleek letters split by a glowing cyan light-line
logos.designBreakdown: Refined minimal geometric capitals in dark charcoal, each letter interrupted by a single thin channel of glowing cyan light, like a light-cycle ribbon threaded through the strokes. Surfaces are matte and precise; the glow is cool, controlled, and restrained versus the original's exuberant neon. Tight, even, and architectural.
logos.promptSnippet: Sleek minimal charcoal capitals each split by a thin glowing cyan light-line, matte precise surfaces, restrained modern futuristic tech logo

logos.title: Blade Runner 2049
logos.signatureElement: Widely-tracked lettering dissolving in neon-turquoise haze
logos.designBreakdown: An updated cut of the original's wide capitals, recoloured from warm red to a glowing neon turquoise-cyan. The letters sit inside heavy atmospheric haze, edges blooming and dissolving into fog and light. The mood is cold, spacious, and luminous, with wide tracking and a soft outer glow.
logos.promptSnippet: Wide clean futurist capitals glowing neon turquoise, edges blooming into atmospheric haze and fog, cold luminous cinematic sci-fi title logo

logos.title: Dune
logos.signatureElement: Title built from four identical rotated U-forms
logos.designBreakdown: A monumental austere wordmark where D-U-N-E are constructed from four identical U-shapes rotated to different orientations, extreme geometric symmetry with curved bottoms and open counters. Ultra-wide, flat-topped, and monolithic, it reads like carved stone or architecture. Minimal sans-serif with uniform stroke and no ornament, quiet brutalist grandeur.
logos.promptSnippet: Monumental symmetric sans title built from four identical rotated U-shapes, ultra-wide flat-topped monolithic capitals, austere brutalist sci-fi logo

logos.title: Doctor Who
logos.signatureElement: 'DW' monogram forming a TARDIS police box
logos.designBreakdown: A bold interlocking DW monogram whose proportions and negative space evoke a TARDIS police box, set beside heavy, slightly futuristic grotesque capitals. Render in brushed steel and graphite blue with a subtle embossed shine and a cool electric-blue rim light. The wordmark stays clean and modern while hiding the time-machine silhouette in the initials.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold 'DW' monogram shaped like a TARDIS police box beside heavy futuristic capitals, brushed steel with electric-blue rim light, sci-fi TV logo

logos.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, wide capitals that look machined from a spacecraft hull, with strokes tapering to sharp points and elongated horizontal extensions that add forward momentum. Subtle thick-to-thin modulation and a swept feel evoke 1960s space-age optimism. Render in cool metallic blue-white with a faint outer glow against deep starfield black.
logos.promptSnippet: Wide retro-futuristic capitals with sharply tapered swept terminals, metallic blue-white, faint glow, deep starfield background, 1960s space-age TV title logo

logos.title: The Mandalorian
logos.signatureElement: Thin, widely-tracked caps in scuffed beskar steel
logos.designBreakdown: Slim, elegant all-caps set with very wide letter-spacing, restrained and cinematic. Each letter carries a scuffed, weathered beskar-steel texture with faint scratches and a cold silver sheen. Sparse and armored, with understated Star Wars gravitas.
logos.promptSnippet: Slim widely letter-spaced capitals with scuffed weathered steel texture and cold silver sheen, minimal cinematic sci-fi Western title logo

logos.title: Arcane
logos.designBreakdown: Sharp, faceted capitals with gem-cut bevels and pointed apexes, fractured as though carved from hextech crystal. Fissures glow with arcane blue energy running through the letter cores, while the metallic-stone surface catches hard highlights. Industrial-magic tension between polished bevels and cracked, luminous seams.
logos.promptSnippet: Faceted gem-cut capitals fractured like hextech crystal, glowing arcane-blue seams, beveled 3D facets, pointed apexes, polished metallic-stone surface, industrial-magic tension

logos.title: Loki
logos.signatureElement: Letterforms that flicker through comic fonts, runes and alien script
logos.designBreakdown: A shapeshifting wordmark: each letter flickers between comic-book type, Norse runes and alien TVA glyphs before snapping into place, unified by a flat grayscale monochrome treatment. A faint time-slip stutter and ghosted after-images sell the instability. Cold, bureaucratic and slightly magical.
logos.promptSnippet: Shapeshifting title where letters flicker between comic type, Norse runes and alien glyphs, grayscale with time-slip ghosting, mysterious sci-fi logo

logos.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
logos.signatureElement: Glitchy yellow lettering with cyan/magenta chromatic split
logos.designBreakdown: Angular techno capitals with clipped corners and stencil-like breaks, set in vivid hazard-yellow. A digital glitch fractures the wordmark into offset cyan and magenta channels (chromatic aberration) with scanline noise and pixel-sort tearing. Neon-drenched dystopian street-tech energy.
logos.promptSnippet: Angular hazard-yellow techno capitals fractured by cyan and magenta glitch offset, scanline noise, chromatic aberration, neon cyberpunk anime title logo

logos.title: Suspiria
logos.signatureElement: Irregular jumble of mismatched blood-red capitals
logos.designBreakdown: A deliberately unsettling, custom jumble of capitals set at varying heights, weights and baselines so they crowd and overlap. Forms are blocky and bulky but taper to thin, graceful ends, with a disorienting lowercase dot on the capital I. Letters glow in mismatched blood-reds, bright fresh blood against dried blood, on black. Alarming and hypnotic.
logos.promptSnippet: Jumbled irregular capitals at varying heights, blocky bulky forms with thin graceful ends, blood-red on black, overlapping baselines, unsettling horror

logos.title: Halloween
logos.signatureElement: Amber-glowing serif-gothic letters over a flickering jack-o'-lantern
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, wide-set capitals in ITC Serif Gothic, with its pointed A and round uncial E, rendered as a hollow outline that glows molten amber against pure black. The wordmark zooms slowly outward as a jack-o'-lantern flame flickers beside it. The letterforms stay clean and geometric; the dread comes entirely from the ominous ember-orange luminance, not from grit.
logos.promptSnippet: Wide geometric serif-gothic capitals glowing molten amber, hollow outlined on pure black, ominous ember luminance beside a flickering jack-o'-lantern

logos.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
logos.signatureElement: Blood-red, chisel-carved 3D capitals with jagged cracked edges
logos.designBreakdown: Aggressive uppercase letters carved in stone-like relief, beveled and cracked as though gouged by Freddy's blades, washed in dripping blood-red with darker crevices. Rough, splintered edges and mist curling around the base sell the nightmare. High contrast: crimson letters emerging from a black void.
logos.promptSnippet: Blood-red uppercase carved in cracked stone relief, beveled and jagged as if gouged by claws, emerging from a black misty void

logos.title: Se7en
logos.signatureElement: Scratched, hand-scrawled '7' replacing the V in SEVEN
logos.designBreakdown: Frantic, scratched white handwriting on black, the Kyle Cooper credits aesthetic, where SEVEN becomes SE7EN with a jittery numeral 7 clawed in for the V. Letters look scraped and re-traced, uneven and nervous, some strokes doubled. Raw, distressed, photocopied grit.
logos.promptSnippet: Frantic scratched white handwriting on black, SE7EN with a clawed numeral 7 for the V, jittery uneven strokes, distressed and nervous

logos.designBreakdown: Three heavy, hand-forged numerals with rough, painterly outlines and uneven weight. The surface is cracked, corroded bronze streaked with grime and scratches, flecked with sprays of blood-red. It looks battle-worn and brutal, as if hammered from ancient metal. Raw, violent and gritty.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy cracked bronze numerals, corroded battle-worn metal, red blood spatter, rough painterly edges, brutal gritty epic

logos.title: The Conjuring
logos.signatureElement: Aged, hand-inked vintage serif with weathered cracking
logos.designBreakdown: A vintage 1970s-horror serif in warm cream, its letters slightly irregular and hand-inked with flared serifs, overlaid with fine cracks, mildew and age-stains. It evokes a haunted antique book cover. Understated color, all the menace lives in the weathering and the tarnished off-white glow.
logos.promptSnippet: Warm-cream vintage serif, hand-inked irregular letters with flared serifs, overlaid with cracks and age-stains like a haunted antique book cover

logos.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy, tightly packed condensed capitals stacked as MAD MAX over a huge FURY ROAD, battered with distress: sandblasted, scratched, and scorched metal texture. Colour splits between the film's signature hot orange and cold teal, edges chipped and grimy. Brutal, weathered, and post-apocalyptic, type that looks dragged across the desert.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy condensed stacked capitals with sandblasted scorched-metal distress, split teal-and-orange grade, chipped grimy edges, post-apocalyptic title logo

logos.title: True Blood
logos.signatureElement: Wet blood-red serif with a crimson drip
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, tightly-set serif capitals soaked in deep arterial crimson with a glossy, wet-blood sheen. Subtle grunge and faint drips bleed from the letterforms, and a swampy Southern-gothic grain grounds the type. The red glistens against black like fresh blood on skin, sensual and menacing at once.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold serif capitals in wet arterial red, glossy blood sheen, faint crimson drips, subtle grunge, black background, sensual southern-gothic horror wordmark

logos.title: The Walking Dead
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy, wide all-caps slab-serif letters cast in dead ash-gray, their surfaces corroded and pitted as if rusted and rotting. Chunks are eaten from the strokes, edges crumble, and faint blood spatter and grime cling to the forms. Against black it reads like weathered metal signage left to decay in a wasteland.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy eroded slab-serif capitals in ash gray, corroded pitted surface, crumbling edges, faint blood spatter on black, apocalyptic decayed signage

logos.title: American Horror Story
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, spindly condensed serif capitals in bone-white on black, violently distressed with scratches, ink flecks and a nervous frame-to-frame jitter. Letters look eroded and hand-scraped, their edges eaten away as if by film damage, evoking a decayed medical-horror ledger. Heavy grain and a cold, clinical vintage texture complete the unsettling tone.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall spindly distressed serif capitals, bone-white on black, scratched eroded edges, heavy film grain, nervous vintage horror title lettering

logos.title: Vikings
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, angular capitals built from straight rune-like strokes, as if gouged into weathered wood or standing stone. Heavy erosion, cracks and gouged distress break the edges, and the A and V take sharp Nordic angular forms. A cold, desaturated grey-brown finish evokes carved Norse memorial stones.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold angular rune-like capitals gouged into weathered stone, cracked eroded distress, sharp Nordic letterforms, cold desaturated grey-brown carved finish

logos.title: Peaky Blinders
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy, tightly-set condensed capitals wearing a gritty, corroded steel texture, edges eaten by soot and industrial grime. The desaturated gunmetal-and-smoke palette evokes 1920s Birmingham foundries, the letters looking stamped from riveted iron. Bleak, hard and working-class menacing.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy condensed capitals stamped from corroded riveted steel, soot-eaten distressed edges, gunmetal-and-smoke palette, bleak industrial 1920s menace

logos.title: Stranger Things
logos.signatureElement: Red airbrushed outline serif with neon glow
logos.designBreakdown: Chunky, tightly-kerned ITC-Benguiat-style serif capitals stacked over two lines, drawn as hollow red outlines with an inner airbrushed gradient and a soft outer neon glow. The overlapping letters bleed into one another, radiating a crimson pulp-paperback aura against deep black. Pure 1980s sci-fi/horror-paperback nostalgia.
logos.promptSnippet: Retro 1980s serif capitals, red hollow outlines with airbrushed inner gradient and neon outer glow, tight overlapping letters on black

logos.title: Chilling Adventures of Sabrina
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, condensed serif capitals with sharp pointed serifs, drenched in deep blood-crimson against black. The letterforms echo 1960s occult and EC-horror-comic lettering, elegant yet sinister, with a faint vintage grain and inky edges. SABRINA dominates the lockup like a seance invitation.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall condensed crimson serif capitals with sharp pointed serifs on black, vintage occult horror-comic lettering, faint grain, sinister elegant title

logos.title: Wednesday
logos.designBreakdown: Bespoke gothic capitals with razor-sharp angular terminals and dramatic thick-to-thin contrast, elegant yet menacing. The W spreads like a raven's protective wings and descenders taper like funeral shrouds; pointed apexes feel bladed. Stark monochrome, macabre and darkly refined.
logos.promptSnippet: Bespoke gothic capitals with razor-sharp angular terminals, dramatic thick-thin contrast, raven-wing W, bladed apexes, elegant menacing macabre monochrome

logos.title: Ghostbusters
logos.designBreakdown: A plump white cartoon ghost, hands up and startled, trapped behind the red circle-and-slash no sign, the ultimate icon logo. Paired with a bold, friendly rounded-sans GHOSTBUSTERS. Flat pop primaries: red sign, black outline, white ghost, blue wordmark. Clean, comic and instantly readable.
logos.promptSnippet: Plump startled white cartoon ghost behind a red circle-and-slash prohibition sign, paired with a bold friendly rounded-sans wordmark, flat pop colors

logos.title: Akira
logos.designBreakdown: The iconic mark pairs katakana in bold blood-red brush-influenced strokes with heavy red uppercase Latin AKIRA capitals. Letterforms are weighty and industrial with clean flat terminals, set against black or the glowing sprawl of Neo-Tokyo. The red is emphatic and total, the colour of the film's apocalyptic energy.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold blood-red katakana paired with heavy uppercase AKIRA capitals on black, industrial flat terminals, cyberpunk Neo-Tokyo title emblem

logos.title: Jurassic Park
logos.signatureElement: Tyrannosaurus skeleton framed in a red circular warning badge
logos.designBreakdown: A black T-Rex skeleton silhouette caged inside a bold red-outlined circle, over a black-and-red banner reading JURASSIC PARK in chunky, hand-cut Neuland-style capitals with rough carved edges. Field-guide / warning-sign iconography: primal, blocky, amber-and-black. The emblem is the whole identity.
logos.promptSnippet: Black T-Rex skeleton inside a bold red-ringed badge over a banner of chunky hand-cut carved capitals, primal warning-sign iconography in red, black and amber

logos.title: Fight Club
logos.signatureElement: 'FIGHT CLUB' debossed into a pink bar of soap
logos.designBreakdown: The title pressed as debossed uppercase into a glossy pink bar of soap, clean, bold condensed sans letters sunk into the surface with soft shadowed edges. Deadpan and product-like; the wit is in branding an anarchist film like bathroom soap. Pink object on a plain ground.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold condensed uppercase debossed into a glossy pink bar of soap, letters sunk with soft shadowed edges, deadpan product-style branding, minimal ground

logos.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
logos.designBreakdown: Chunky, hand-drawn serif capitals with slightly irregular, storybook edges, gently arced across the wordmark. Everything is cast in bronze-gold with a beveled, engraved 3D finish and dimensional shadow. The signature move is the capital P in Potter, whose crossbar becomes a jagged lightning-bolt scar. Whimsical yet weighty and magical.
logos.promptSnippet: Bronze beveled 3D serif capitals, jagged lightning-bolt forming the P crossbar, engraved metallic finish, gently arced, magical

logos.title: Deadpool
logos.signatureElement: Deadpool mask emblem, red field, black split, two angular white eyes
logos.designBreakdown: The circular Deadpool mask icon: a red domed head bisected by black, with two slanted white almond eye-patches giving a wry, deadpan glare, often standing in for a letter. The wordmark is heavy, blunt uppercase. Palette is pure X-Force red and black, irreverent, bold, comic-book swagger.
logos.promptSnippet: Circular Deadpool mask emblem, red head split with black and two slanted white almond eyes glaring, paired with heavy blunt red-and-black capitals

logos.title: Batman
logos.signatureElement: Winged bat emblem behind comic caps
logos.designBreakdown: Bold comic-book capitals in punchy red with a thick yellow outline, sitting in front of a black winged bat silhouette. Pop-art energy, like a POW! panel leaping off the page. Loud, campy, mid-60s superhero fun.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold red comic-book capitals with thick yellow outline over a black winged bat silhouette, pop-art 1960s superhero title logo

logos.title: The Sopranos
logos.designBreakdown: Straightforward bold white capitals, but the R in SOPRANOS is a blood-red revolver, its barrel forming the leg of the letter and pointing down. The plain typography makes the violent swap land harder. Stark white-on-black with the single red weapon.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold white capitals where the letter R is a red handgun forming the R's leg, stark black background, gritty crime-drama title logo

logos.title: Breaking Bad
logos.designBreakdown: Plain grey sans-serif spells the words, but the leading Br of Breaking and Ba of Bad are swapped for green periodic-table tiles, element symbol large with the atomic number small in the corner. The chemistry motif hides the title in plain sight. A muted, clinical palette of moss green and grey.
logos.promptSnippet: Plain grey sans-serif words with two letters replaced by green periodic-table element tiles showing symbol and atomic number, clinical chemistry title logo

logos.title: The Witcher
logos.designBreakdown: Clean, sharp capital letterforms with subtly flared, blade-like serifs, paired with the show's silver wolf-head medallion, snarling muzzle and slitted eyes, as the dominant emblem. The metal medallion carries scratched, battle-worn texture, while the wordmark sits in restrained gunmetal beneath it. Cold, Slavic-medieval and monstrous.
logos.promptSnippet: Snarling silver wolf-head medallion emblem above sharp gunmetal capitals with blade-like serifs, scratched battle-worn metal, cold Slavic-medieval mood

logos.title: The Umbrella Academy
logos.designBreakdown: Bold, blocky display capitals paired with the academy's umbrella emblem, a stylized open umbrella crest, as the defining motif. The type carries a quirky graphic-novel weight and a slightly vintage-institutional feel, often monochrome or in muted comic tones. Offbeat, crest-like and dryly gothic.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold blocky display capitals with a stylized open-umbrella crest emblem, graphic-novel weight, vintage-institutional feel, offbeat dry-gothic comic mood

logos.title: Good Omens
logos.signatureElement: Halo over the O, devil-tail on the M
logos.designBreakdown: A stacked two-line wordmark, good above omens, in a classic Garamond-flavored serif, black on cream. A tiny golden halo hovers over the first O while the M sprouts a curling devil's tail, encoding the angel-and-demon duality directly into the letters. Balanced, witty and storybook-elegant.
logos.promptSnippet: Stacked serif wordmark good omens, classic Garamond, black on cream, tiny halo over the O and a curling devil tail on the M, witty duality

logos.title: Shadow and Bone
logos.designBreakdown: Angular serif capitals in warm gold sit before a radiant Sun Summoner emblem, a stylized sun whose rays are partly swallowed by the black of the Shadow Fold, splitting light from darkness. The sunburst is symmetrical and heraldic, with thin engraved rays; the type is stately and spaced. A gilded-on-black palette gives an ornate, occult grandeur.
logos.promptSnippet: Radiant golden sunburst emblem half-swallowed by shadow, angular gold serif capitals, engraved rays, symmetrical heraldic layout, gilded occult grandeur on black

logos.title: Squid Game
logos.signatureElement: Circle, triangle & square nested in the Q, A and E
logos.designBreakdown: Distorted futuristic capitals, hand-mangled with irregular anchor points for a brutal, uneasy feel. The game's three symbols sit inside the letters: a black circle in the Q, a triangle in the A, a square in the E. White letters with black inset shapes over a grungy salmon-pink field.
logos.promptSnippet: Distorted white futuristic capitals with a circle, triangle and square set inside letters, grungy salmon-pink background, tense survival-thriller title logo

logos.title: The Sandman
logos.designBreakdown: Evenly spaced dark capitals in a slightly gothic serif, unified with a smoky, dream-like texture over near-black. The centerpiece is a custom, stylized D whose form evokes Dream's helm and the series' sigils. The whole wordmark feels nocturnal and mythic, letters floating like symbols in the dark.
logos.promptSnippet: Evenly spaced dark gothic serif capitals with a custom stylized D shaped like a dream-lord's helm, smoky texture, near-black nocturnal title

logos.title: Rocky
logos.signatureElement: Colossal steel caps charging forward in perspective
logos.designBreakdown: Enormous, wide, heavyweight capitals extruded into deep 3D and thrown into dramatic one-point perspective so ROCKY surges toward the viewer. Surfaces read as brushed steel or chrome with strong highlights and hard shadow, monumental and unstoppable. Blunt flat terminals and no serifs, brute strength rendered as typography.
logos.promptSnippet: Colossal heavyweight capitals extruded in dramatic one-point perspective surging toward the viewer, brushed steel chrome surfaces, monumental 3D title logo

logos.title: Superman: The Movie
logos.signatureElement: Chrome-blue beveled caps flying toward the viewer
logos.designBreakdown: Bold rounded capitals rendered in gleaming blue chrome with a bright red inner edge, beveled and reflective. The wordmark rushes forward in exaggerated one-point perspective with a lens-flare glint, evoking flight and speed. Smooth aerodynamic letterforms with soft shoulders, heroic, polished, and airborne.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold rounded capitals in gleaming blue chrome with red edge, beveled and reflective, rushing forward in perspective with lens flare, heroic 3D logo

logos.title: Back to the Future
logos.signatureElement: Chrome letters blasting forward in fiery perspective
logos.designBreakdown: Bold slanted italic capitals in polished chrome, tilted into aggressive one-point perspective so the word rockets toward the viewer. Edges catch a fiery red-orange-to-yellow gradient like flame trails, with speed streaks reinforcing motion. BACK TO THE sits small above a huge FUTURE. Sleek, kinetic, and unmistakably 1980s.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold italic chrome capitals rocketing forward in perspective, fiery red-orange-to-yellow edge gradient with speed streaks, kinetic 1980s title logo

logos.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
logos.signatureElement: Cold brushed-steel slab beside a towering chrome 2
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy, slightly condensed industrial capitals cast in cold brushed steel with hard bevels and a blue-grey sheen, paired with a massive chromed numeral 2. Surfaces suggest riveted machinery and molten liquid-metal reflections, sometimes fractured or cracked. Grim, weighty, and mechanical, engineered rather than drawn.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy condensed industrial capitals in cold brushed steel with hard bevels beside a giant chrome numeral 2, liquid-metal reflections, mechanical 3D logo

logos.title: Frozen
logos.designBreakdown: Crisp, angular capitals that look carved from translucent ice, their surfaces faceted like cut crystal. A pale white-to-icy-blue gradient runs through them, edged with frost and fine hairline cracks. A delicate snowflake nestles among the letters. Cold, glittering and magical.
logos.promptSnippet: Angular capitals carved from translucent blue ice, faceted crystalline surfaces, frost and hairline cracks, snowflake accent, cold shimmer

logos.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy upright capitals rendered as if machined from solid gold bars, with thick beveled facets, polished highlights, and a warm luxurious sheen. The letterforms are bold and squared with subtle chamfers catching light along every edge. Regal and weighty, often set against cosmic backdrops that make the gold glint.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy squared capitals machined from polished solid gold, beveled facets and glinting highlights, warm luxurious 3D metallic cosmic title logo

logos.title: Knight Rider
logos.designBreakdown: Heavy forward-slanted chrome capitals stacked tight, cut across by a single sweeping red horizontal light bar that echoes KITT's oscillating scanner. The metal is dark gunmetal chrome with a hot red glow bleeding from the bar. Aggressive 1980s action styling, all momentum and menace.
logos.promptSnippet: Heavy slanted chrome capitals with a sweeping glowing red scanner light-bar across them, gunmetal finish, 1980s action TV title logo on black

logos.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
logos.designBreakdown: Horizontally stretched capitals leaning into a slight italic, with tiny slab feet and a squared-off A. Finished in polished chrome and silver with a beveled edge and bright specular highlights running along the top of each stroke. The extreme width and mirror finish read as sleek 1980s starship signage.
logos.promptSnippet: Elongated horizontally-stretched italic capitals in polished chrome with beveled edges and specular highlights, sleek 1980s sci-fi title logo on black

logos.title: Game of Thrones
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, angular inscriptional capitals with sharp wedge serifs, rendered as cold forged steel with beveled edges and fine engraved striations. A muted gunmetal-to-silver gradient catches raking light across the faces, so the letters read as if chiseled from Valyrian steel. Tight, monumental spacing gives an austere, medieval-heraldic gravity.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall angular steel capitals, sharp wedge serifs, engraved forged-metal texture, beveled edges, cold gunmetal-to-silver gradient, monumental medieval heraldic weight

logos.title: Castlevania
logos.signatureElement: Gothic blackletter with steel sheen and vampiric spikes
logos.designBreakdown: Towering gothic, blackletter-influenced capitals with sharp spurs and cathedral-like ornament, forged in cold silver-steel with subtle beveling and a faint blood-red glint. Symmetrical and imposing, the wordmark evokes Gothic architecture and Belmont vampire-hunting menace. Metallic highlights race along the razor edges against black.
logos.promptSnippet: Towering gothic blackletter capitals forged in silver-steel with beveled edges, sharp spurs, faint blood-red glint, cathedral ornament, imposing on black

logos.title: House of the Dragon
logos.designBreakdown: Refined angular capitals cast in bronze-tinged forged steel, with elongated tapering serifs and crisp beveled facets. The metal surface carries subtle heat-scorched and hammered texture evoking a dragon-forged blade. Slightly more elegant and spread than Game of Thrones, set against a dark, smoky ground.
logos.promptSnippet: Angular bronze-steel capitals, tapered elongated serifs, hammered dragon-forged blade texture, beveled facets, heat-scorched sheen, smoky dark background, regal medieval weight

logos.title: Grease
logos.designBreakdown: Puffy, hand-drawn capitals with distinctive elongated serifs, animated originally from melting droplets of hair grease. The forms are lumpy and loose in a deliberately unpolished 1950s style, typically in bubblegum pink with a car-body outline pun. Playful, greasy and rock-and-roll. Retro and fun.
logos.promptSnippet: Puffy hand-drawn caps with elongated serifs, bubblegum pink, lumpy loose 1950s rock-and-roll feel, car-outline lettering, playful

logos.title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, thin, hand-drawn gothic capitals with spidery, slightly crooked strokes and sharp tapering terminals, the Burtons Nightmare look. Bone-white or pale on black, wobbling as if sketched by candlelight in Halloween Town, often paired with Jack Skellington's grinning skull or a crescent moon. Whimsical yet macabre.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall spidery hand-drawn gothic capitals, crooked tapering strokes wobbling bone-white on black, Burton-esque Halloween-Town lettering, whimsical and macabre

logos.title: Scott Pilgrim vs. the World
logos.signatureElement: Comic hand-lettered wordmark with an oversized 8-bit 'VS'
logos.designBreakdown: Chunky, bold comic hand-lettering from Bryan Lee O'Malley's graphic novels, bouncy, uneven caps with thick outlines in poppy primaries. A giant pixelated 8-bit VS (a video-game duel screen) crashes between the words, complete with coins-and-power-up energy. Loud, playful, arcade-meets-indie-comic.
logos.promptSnippet: Chunky outlined comic hand-lettering in poppy primaries with a giant pixelated 8-bit VS crashing between the words, arcade-meets-indie-comic energy

logos.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
logos.signatureElement: Glitchy RGB chromatic-aberration comic lettering over halftone dots
logos.designBreakdown: Bold comic-book capitals split into misregistered red-and-cyan channels, the chromatic-aberration glitch, sitting on Ben-Day halftone dots with spray-paint and graffiti energy. Vibrant magenta, cyan and yellow pop, plus marks and thwip motion streaks. The spider emblem punctuates it, like a printed comic exploding off the page.
logos.promptSnippet: Bold comic capitals split into misregistered red-cyan glitch channels over halftone dots, graffiti energy, vivid magenta-cyan-yellow, punctuated by a spider emblem

logos.title: Bewitched
logos.designBreakdown: Bouncy mid-century hand-lettering paired with a cheeky cartoon witch riding a broom, trailing magical sparkles that dot the letters. A playful uneven baseline and rounded strokes in candy colors. Whimsical 1960s animated-title charm.
logos.promptSnippet: Bouncy mid-century hand-lettering with a cartoon witch on a broomstick trailing sparkles, whimsical 1960s animated sitcom title logo

logos.title: The Simpsons
logos.designBreakdown: Tall, chunky hand-drawn capitals with pointed spur-serifs and a wobbling outline, bursting forward through fluffy blue-sky clouds. Bold fill with a thick outline and cast shadow. Loud, cheeky and instantly cartoon.
logos.promptSnippet: Tall chunky hand-drawn capitals with pointed serifs bursting through fluffy blue-sky clouds, thick outline, iconic cartoon sitcom title logo

logos.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
logos.designBreakdown: Loud early-90s graffiti lettering, airbrushed in clashing neon colors with drips, splats and squiggle accents. Each word in a different bright hue over a splattered paint background, hip-hop and playful. High-energy block-party fun.
logos.promptSnippet: Loud early-90s graffiti lettering airbrushed in clashing neon colors with drips and splats, playful hip-hop sitcom title logo

logos.title: Adventure Time
logos.designBreakdown: Thick, rounded hand-drawn capitals with a shaky, imperfect outline and a slight forward tumble, like doodles in a kid's notebook. A simple flat fill (often pink or white) with a bold dark outline and a subtle bevel. Cute, adventurous and storybook.
logos.promptSnippet: Thick rounded hand-drawn capitals with a shaky outline and tumbling baseline, flat fill, playful storybook cartoon title logo

logos.title: Rick and Morty
logos.designBreakdown: Loose, wobbly hand-drawn bubble capitals outlined in acid portal-green, with glowing goo dripping off the baseline. Slightly manic, with uneven weights and a sci-fi ooze glow. Chaotic, irreverent and dimension-hopping.
logos.promptSnippet: Wobbly hand-drawn bubble capitals outlined in glowing portal-green with dripping goo, chaotic adult-cartoon sci-fi title logo

logos.title: Steven Universe
logos.signatureElement: Pink five-point star in cosmic bubble letters
logos.designBreakdown: Soft, rounded bubbly capitals filled with a dreamy cosmic gradient of purple, pink and blue speckled with tiny stars. A bright pink five-point star (Steven's emblem) punctuates the wordmark. Gentle, magical, galaxy-pastel warmth.
logos.promptSnippet: Soft rounded bubble capitals filled with a cosmic purple-pink gradient and stars, punctuated by a pink five-point star, gentle magical cartoon title logo
